pilotMetadata.tests: terminal drawer extension ONLY (hard ARTICULATION_GOAL via goal_satisfaction). No contact, articulation-change event, temporal order, or initial object-state semantics.
pilotMetadata.source: RLBench OpenDrawer (bottom/middle/top), live Runpod capture 2026-06-14; observed terminal extension 0.2337/0.2338/0.2348 m. See pilots/rlbench/fixtures/live_runpod_20260614/.
pilotMetadata.toleranceNote: Intended/documentary only and NOT read by the verifier. The FROZEN matcher enforces a single global MatcherConfig.articulation_tol (0.05 m), not this per-target field; honoring a per-target tolerance would require verifier/config changes (out of scope for this step). All three live demos PASS under the enforced 0.05 m window and also fall inside this tighter intended 0.03 m. This block is metadata: csg.canon ignores unknown top-level keys, so it never enters any probe.
pilotMetadata.notAGoldTask: This target is a pilot diagnostic, deliberately NOT added to gold_tests/. It asserts only that a drawer-shaped articulated body reaches the target extension; it does not assert the agent caused it. Use it to read terminal-value mappability, not as a full open_drawer acceptance test.
